chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 95 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 17 2. For hearing of main case 28.10.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2016 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 10.03.2021, following order was passed: “10.03.2021 Mr. Javed Hussain advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for applicant 1) Counsel holds brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj as she is busy before another bench. Accordingly, urgent application is dismissed.” Even today, after nine years later, learned counsel is present and merely time is being sought. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
